title: Why Your Stomach Can Start Digestion Before Eating

segments.text: Your stomach can begin digesting food before you eat.
This is triggered by the sight and smell of food.
Your brain sends signals to prepare your digestive system.
This reaction helps maximize nutrient absorption.
The process is known as ‘cephalic phase digestion’.
So, even anticipation plays a role in digestion.
Your stomach is always ready for the next meal!
Follow Curio for your daily dose of science.

description: Your stomach can get ready before you even eat. Follow for daily science & tech! 🍽️
